name: Build nameforma task system with UUID64 actions

plannedActions.name: Define Action interface with id (UUID64), summary, measure (Rational), details, status
Implement fuzzy matching for UUID64 action IDs (substring, levenshtein, prefix)
Single unified action array with status field (no separate planned/completed lists)
Display actions with UUID64 IDs instead of numbered lists to avoid ambiguity
Ensure action IDs remain stable across sessions (no renumbering on completion)

summary: Replace scv-app Task system with improved nameforma version using Identifiable Actions with UUID64s, fuzzy matching, and Rational measures
